title: maxillaria novoae subsp. minor
intro: Maxillaria novoae subsp. minor, also known as the lesser Maxillaria novoae, is a subspecies of orchid native to Central America. This plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, particularly the flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Maxillaria novoae subsp. minor include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, often combined with other herbs, to create herbal teas and infusions for medicinal purposes.
